title: disterigma parallelinerve
intro: Disterigma parallelinerve, also known as the 'Mountain Violet', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Ericaceae. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Disterigma parallelinerve include the potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Disterigma parallelinerve are usually made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make a poultice or paste for topical applications.
